metadata.name: confidential_token
metadata.description: Solana PoC confidential token using the Zama host program

docs: Anchor entrypoint module for the confidential token PoC.

instructions.name: confidential_burn
docs: Burns an encrypted amount by rotating the account balance and encrypted total supply.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Token owner and burn authority.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint whose encrypted total supply is decreased.

accounts.name: token_account
docs: Token account whose balance is decreased.

accounts.name: balance_value
docs: Stable balance lineage; read for the current handle and superseded by this eval.

accounts.name: total_supply_value
docs: Stable total-supply lineage; read for the current handle and superseded by this eval.

accounts.name: burned_amount_value
docs: account's first burn, superseded in place thereafter to each burn's own
delta. Each burn makes its own delta handle publicly decryptable at burn
(ERC-7984 `unwrap` parity), so every burn stays permanently redeemable
even after a later burn supersedes this lineage (DD-036 / Vector 2 closed).

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program used for FHE operations.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: ZamaHost config used for handle derivation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for ACL account creation.

accounts.name: hcu_block_meter
docs: canonical `["hcu-block-meter", compute_signer]` PDA. Supplied by an untrusted mint under a
metering-band cap; omitted when the mint is trusted or the cap is unrestricted.

accounts.name: hcu_trusted_app_record
docs: canonical `["hcu-trusted", compute_signer]` PDA. Present + valid bypasses the cap; absent
means the mint is metered.

instructions.name: confidential_transfer
docs: Transfers an encrypted amount by rotating the sender and recipient balance handles.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Sender and transfer authority.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent for the transferred-amount lineage on its first bind.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

accounts.name: from_account
docs: Sender token account.

accounts.name: from_balance_value
docs: Sender's stable balance `EncryptedValue` lineage; read for the current
handle and superseded in place by this eval's CPI.

accounts.name: to_balance_value
docs: Recipient's stable balance `EncryptedValue` lineage.

accounts.name: transferred_amount_value
docs: the sender's first transfer, superseded thereafter.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program used for FHE operations.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: ZamaHost config used for handle derivation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for ACL account creation.

accounts.name: hcu_block_meter
docs: canonical `["hcu-block-meter", compute_signer]` PDA. The per-mint HCU block meter — supplied
by an untrusted mint under a metering-band cap, omitted otherwise.

accounts.name: hcu_trusted_app_record
docs: trust witness — present + valid bypasses the cap; absent means untrusted (metered).

instructions.name: confidential_transfer_from_value
docs: Transfers an encrypted amount taken from an existing on-chain `EncryptedValue` (a computed or
received handle) instead of a freshly attested client-side encryption — the path that lets a
contract be the sender of a computed amount (fhevm-internal#1680). The signing owner must be
in the amount value's subject set (the token spend gate); the amount is spent read-only.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Sender and transfer authority. Must be in `amount_value`'s subject set (the spend gate).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent for the transferred-amount lineage on its first bind.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

accounts.name: from_account
docs: Sender token account.

accounts.name: from_balance_value
docs: Sender's stable balance `EncryptedValue` lineage; read for the current
handle and superseded in place by this eval's CPI.

accounts.name: to_balance_value
docs: Recipient's stable balance `EncryptedValue` lineage.

accounts.name: transferred_amount_value
docs: the sender's first transfer, superseded thereafter.

accounts.name: amount_value
docs: The existing encrypted amount to spend: a computed or received `euint64` handle. Read-only
durable operand — never superseded, never consumed. Its address is the canonical PDA of its
own `(acl_domain_key, app_account, encrypted_value_label)` fields, so a lineage from any app
may be passed here once its owner has granted the mint's compute subject via `allow_subjects`.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program used for FHE operations.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: ZamaHost config used for handle derivation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for ACL account creation.

accounts.name: hcu_block_meter
docs: canonical `["hcu-block-meter", compute_signer]` PDA. The per-mint HCU block meter — supplied
by an untrusted mint under a metering-band cap, omitted otherwise.

accounts.name: hcu_trusted_app_record
docs: trust witness — present + valid bypasses the cap; absent means untrusted (metered).

instructions.name: disclose_secp
docs: Consumes a KMS public-decrypt certificate through the stateless host verifier and emits a
token-scoped disclosed event. See `instructions::disclose_secp` for the act-once semantics
(idempotent by design — no on-chain replay marker).

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint whose ACL domain scopes the disclosed lineage and event.

accounts.name: encrypted_value
docs: The `EncryptedValue` lineage the disclosed handle belongs to.
CPI; this handler additionally binds its `acl_domain_key` to `mint`.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: Host config carrying the current KMS context id and gateway EIP-712 domain.

accounts.name: kms_context
docs: KMS context PDA for the id the certificate commits to (any live context; validated by the
verifier CPI).

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program used for the stateless verifier CPI.

instructions.name: initialize_mint
docs: Initializes a confidential mint and records its host ACL domain.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Mint authority and rent payer.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint account created by this instruction.

accounts.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint wrapped by this confidential mint.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program used to create the initial total-supply handle.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: ZamaHost config used for handle derivation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for account creation.

accounts.name: hcu_block_meter
docs: canonical `["hcu-block-meter", compute_signer]` PDA. Supplied by an untrusted mint under a
metering-band cap; omitted when the mint is trusted or the cap is unrestricted.

accounts.name: hcu_trusted_app_record
docs: canonical `["hcu-trusted", compute_signer]` PDA. Present + valid bypasses the cap; absent
means the mint is metered.

instructions.name: initialize_token_account
docs: Initializes a token account and creates its initial confidential balance handle.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Account owner and rent payer.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint this account belongs to.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program used to create the initial balance handle.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: ZamaHost config used for handle derivation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for account creation.

accounts.name: hcu_block_meter
docs: canonical `["hcu-block-meter", compute_signer]` PDA. Supplied by an untrusted mint under a
metering-band cap; omitted when the mint is trusted or the cap is unrestricted.

accounts.name: hcu_trusted_app_record
docs: canonical `["hcu-trusted", compute_signer]` PDA. Present + valid bypasses the cap; absent
means the mint is metered.

instructions.name: redeem_burned_amount
docs: Redeems a KMS-certified burned amount from the SPL vault through the stateless host verifier.
Verifies the KMS `PublicDecryptVerification` certificate against the context the cert names
(any live, non-destroyed context, EVM-parity rotation grace) plus an exact-handle MMR
public-decrypt proof, then pays out `cleartext_amount` and writes the
permanent per-handle `BurnRedemption` marker. See `instructions::redeem_burned_amount`.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Token owner, redemption recipient, and payer for the replay marker.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint whose vault backs the redeemed burned amount.

accounts.name: token_account
docs: Confidential token account that produced the burned amount.

accounts.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint.

accounts.name: vault_usdc
docs: Program vault USDC token account.

accounts.name: destination_usdc
docs: Signer's destination USDC token account (any SPL account of the right mint owned by the
signer, not necessarily the ATA).

accounts.name: burned_amount_value
docs: Burned amount `EncryptedValue` lineage whose handle is redeemed. Bound to the mint/token
account/owner by `assert_burned_amount_lineage`; its canonical PDA, layout, host ownership,
and the exact-handle MMR inclusion proof are validated by the `verify_public_decrypt` CPI.

accounts.name: redemption_record
docs: Replay marker for this burned handle: write-once, never closed, the sole durable "paid out"
bit for `(mint, burned_handle)`.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: Host config carrying the current KMS context id and gateway EIP-712 domain.

accounts.name: kms_context
docs: KMS context PDA for the id the certificate commits to (any live context; validated by the
verifier CPI).

accounts.name: deny_subject_record
docs: consulted read-only by `assert_redeem_subject_not_denied`. Absent (must be `None`) when the
deny-list is disabled.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program used for the stateless verifier CPI.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL token program.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for the replay marker.

instructions.name: wrap_usdc
docs: Escrows public USDC and rotates the confidential balance by `amount`.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Token owner and transfer authority.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

accounts.name: token_account
docs: Confidential token account whose balance is increased.

accounts.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint.

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: Owner's source USDC token account.

accounts.name: vault_usdc
docs: Program vault USDC token account.

accounts.name: balance_value
docs: Stable balance lineage; read for the current handle and superseded by this eval.

accounts.name: total_supply_value
docs: Stable total-supply lineage; read for the current handle and superseded by this eval.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program used for FHE operations.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: ZamaHost config used for handle derivation.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL token program.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for ACL account creation.

accounts.name: hcu_block_meter
docs: canonical `["hcu-block-meter", compute_signer]` PDA. Supplied by an untrusted mint under a
metering-band cap; omitted when the mint is trusted or the cap is unrestricted.

accounts.name: hcu_trusted_app_record
docs: canonical `["hcu-trusted", compute_signer]` PDA. Present + valid bypasses the cap; absent
means the mint is metered.

errors.name: OwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Token owner does not match signer

errors.name: MintMismatch
errors.msg: Token account mint does not match

errors.name: MintAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Confidential mint account is invalid

errors.name: InvalidMintConfig
errors.msg: Confidential mint config is invalid

errors.name: MintAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: Confidential mint authority does not match signer

errors.name: UnexpectedRemainingAccounts
errors.msg: instruction has unexpected remaining accounts

errors.name: TokenAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Confidential token account is not canonical

errors.name: AclNonceOverflow
errors.msg: ACL nonce overflow

errors.name: NonZeroInitialBalanceUnsupported
errors.msg: nonzero initial confidential balances are unsupported

errors.name: UnderlyingMintMismatch
errors.msg: Underlying mint does not match confidential mint

errors.name: VaultAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: Vault token account authority does not match vault authority PDA

errors.name: VaultAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Vault token account is not the canonical mint vault

errors.name: AclDomainKeyMismatch
errors.msg: Confidential mint ACL domain key is invalid

errors.name: ComputeSignerMismatch
errors.msg: Compute signer does not match confidential mint

errors.name: CurrentEncryptedValueMismatch
errors.msg: current encrypted value does not match token account state

errors.name: AmountHandleTypeMismatch
errors.msg: transfer amount handle type is invalid

errors.name: AmountAclMismatch
errors.msg: transfer amount ACL record is invalid

errors.name: AttestationUserMismatch
errors.msg: attested input user does not match owner

errors.name: AttestationContractMismatch
errors.msg: attested input contract does not match compute signer

errors.name: AmountSpendSubjectMismatch
errors.msg: amount value spender is not in the amount's subject set

errors.name: TotalSupplyAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: total supply authority does not match mint

errors.name: InvalidKmsCertificate
errors.msg: KMS public-decrypt certificate is invalid

errors.name: PublicDecryptProofInvalid
errors.msg: public-decrypt MMR proof is invalid for this lineage

errors.name: GatewayVerifierConfigUnset
errors.msg: gateway verifier config is not set

errors.name: InvalidKmsContext
errors.msg: KMS context is not valid for this request

errors.name: RequestWitnessMismatch
errors.msg: request witness does not match

errors.name: RequestWitnessUnavailable
errors.msg: request witness is expired or already consumed

errors.name: MaterialCommitmentMismatch
errors.msg: material commitment witness does not match (retired)

errors.name: PublicDecryptNotReleased
errors.msg: handle is not released for public decrypt (retired)

errors.name: InvalidFheEvalPlan
errors.msg: FHE eval plan is invalid

errors.name: DuplicateFheEvalAccount
errors.msg: FHE eval account list contains a duplicate account

errors.name: UnexpectedFheEvalAccount
errors.msg: FHE eval account list contains an unexpected account

errors.name: MissingFheEvalAccount
errors.msg: FHE eval plan is missing a required dynamic account

errors.name: FheEvalAccountNotWritable
errors.msg: FHE eval dynamic account must be writable

errors.name: DuplicateFheOutputAuthority
errors.msg: FHE eval output authority list contains a duplicate authority

errors.name: UnexpectedFheOutputAuthority
errors.msg: FHE eval output authority list contains an unexpected authority

errors.name: MissingFheOutputAuthority
errors.msg: FHE eval plan is missing a required output authority

errors.name: VerifierReturnDataInvalid
errors.msg: public-decrypt verifier return data is invalid

errors.name: DisclosedHandleMismatch
errors.msg: disclosed handle does not match the pinned handle

errors.name: RedemptionSubjectDenied
errors.msg: redemption subject is denied

errors.name: RedemptionDenyRecordInvalid
errors.msg: redemption deny-list record is invalid

errors.name: CleartextExceedsEuint64
errors.msg: certified cleartext exceeds euint64 width

types.name: BalanceHandleUpdateReason
docs: Reason code for [`BalanceHandleUpdatedEvent`].

types.name: BalanceHandleUpdatedEvent
docs: App-local balance history event.
This event is for frontend/app indexers. The generic coprocessor listener
consumes ZamaHost protocol events instead.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: owner
docs: Token account owner.

fields.name: token_account
docs: Confidential token account.

fields.name: old_handle
docs: Previous balance handle.

fields.name: old_encrypted_value
docs: Previous ZamaHost ACL record.

fields.name: new_handle
docs: New balance handle.

fields.name: new_encrypted_value
docs: New ZamaHost ACL record.

fields.name: reason
docs: Reason this balance pointer changed.

types.name: BurnRedeemedEvent
docs: Emitted when a KMS-certified burned amount is redeemed from the vault.
After the `BurnRedemptionRequest` witness lifecycle was dissolved (fhevm-internal#1763), redeem is
a single instruction with no request witness, so this event no longer carries a `request` PDA or
`request_hash`.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: owner
docs: Token account owner.

fields.name: token_account
docs: Confidential token account that produced the burned amount.

fields.name: burned_handle
docs: Burned amount handle proven by KMS.

fields.name: burned_encrypted_value
docs: ACL record for `burned_handle`.

fields.name: destination_usdc
docs: Underlying token destination account.

fields.name: cleartext_amount
docs: KMS-certified cleartext amount released from the vault.

types.name: BurnRedemption
docs: Replay marker for a redeemed burned amount handle.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint whose vault paid the redemption.

fields.name: owner
docs: Token owner that redeemed the burned amount.

fields.name: token_account
docs: Token account that produced the burned amount.

fields.name: burned_handle
docs: Burned amount handle proven by KMS.

fields.name: burned_encrypted_value
docs: `EncryptedValue` lineage for `burned_handle`.

fields.name: cleartext_amount
docs: KMS-certified cleartext amount released from the vault.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `(mint, burned_handle)`.

types.name: ConfidentialAmountKind
docs: Token-scoped amount purpose used for amount-handle birth.

types.name: ConfidentialBurnEvent
docs: Emitted when a confidential burn computes the all-or-zero burned amount.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: owner
docs: Token account owner.

fields.name: token_account
docs: Token account whose balance was debited.

fields.name: burned_handle
docs: Encrypted amount actually burned.

fields.name: burned_encrypted_value
docs: ZamaHost ACL record for `burned_handle`.

types.name: ConfidentialMint
docs: Confidential mint state for the token PoC.
The total supply's current handle and access lineage live in the
`EncryptedValue` account at `total_supply_encrypted_value`.

fields.name: authority
docs: Admin/authority that created the mint.

fields.name: acl_domain_key
docs: ACL domain key, currently equal to the mint pubkey.

fields.name: compute_signer
docs: Program-controlled compute signer PDA.

fields.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint wrapped by this confidential mint.

fields.name: decimals
docs: Decimal precision inherited from the underlying mint.

fields.name: total_supply_encrypted_value
docs: `EncryptedValue` lineage PDA holding the current total-supply handle.

types.name: ConfidentialTokenAccount
docs: Confidential token account state.
The balance's current handle and access lineage live in the
`EncryptedValue` account at `balance_encrypted_value`, not here — addressing
is stable per token account, so no nonce/sequence bookkeeping is needed.

fields.name: owner
docs: Token account owner.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint this account belongs to.

fields.name: balance_encrypted_value
docs: `EncryptedValue` lineage PDA holding the current balance handle.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for the token account.

types.name: ConfidentialTransferEvent
docs: Emitted when a confidential transfer computes the all-or-zero moved amount.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: from_owner
docs: Sender token account owner.

fields.name: from_token_account
docs: Sender confidential token account.

fields.name: to_owner
docs: Recipient token account owner.

fields.name: to_token_account
docs: Recipient confidential token account.

fields.name: transferred_handle
docs: Encrypted amount actually transferred.

fields.name: transferred_encrypted_value
docs: ZamaHost ACL record for `transferred_handle`.

types.name: CoprocessorInputAttestation
docs: A coprocessor input attestation carried inline by a [`FheEvalOperand::VerifiedInput`], re-verified
in-frame (no account, no PDA) — the instruction-local analog of EVM `allowTransient(input, contract)`.

fields.name: input_handle
docs: The verified input handle used as the operand.

fields.name: ct_handles
docs: All ciphertext handles covered by the proof.

fields.name: handle_index
docs: Index of `input_handle` within `ct_handles`.

fields.name: user_address
docs: Attested user identity (bytes32).

fields.name: contract_address
docs: Attested contract identity — the input's ACL domain key (bytes32).

fields.name: contract_chain_id
docs: Gateway-side contract chain id the attestation binds.

fields.name: extra_data
docs: Opaque extra data covered by the attestation.

fields.name: signatures
docs: Coprocessor EIP-712 signatures (65-byte secp256k1).

types.name: EncryptedValue
docs: Canonical ACL + history state for one encrypted-value lineage.
PDA: `[ENCRYPTED_VALUE_SEED, value_key]` where `value_key =
zama_solana_acl::derive_value_key(acl_domain_key, app_account, encrypted_value_label)`.
The account name must stay exactly `EncryptedValue` — Anchor derives the
discriminator from the type name, and it must match
`zama_solana_acl::encrypted_value_discriminator()`.

fields.name: acl_domain_key
docs: App-level ACL domain, such as a confidential token mint.

fields.name: app_account
docs: App-owned account whose encrypted field this lineage represents.

fields.name: encrypted_value_label
docs: Domain-separated encrypted field label inside `app_account`.

fields.name: current_handle
docs: Current encrypted value identifier (the live handle).

fields.name: subjects
docs: Current durable subjects. Membership in this set is the whole ACL.

fields.name: leaf_count
docs: Number of MMR leaves appended; `0` means no history.

fields.name: peaks
docs: MMR peaks, oldest mountain first (`popcount(leaf_count)` entries).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: HandleDisclosedEvent
docs: Emitted when `disclose_secp` publishes a KMS-certified cleartext for a token-scoped handle.
This is the single app-level disclosure event after the `DisclosureRequest` lifecycle was
dissolved (fhevm-internal#1704): it covers both former balance and amount disclosures. It carries
no request witness or `request_hash` — there is no per-request PDA anymore. The request side is
the owner sealing a public-decrypt leaf via the host `make_handle_public` instruction directly.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint whose ACL domain scopes the disclosed lineage.

fields.name: handle
docs: Disclosed handle, proven public by the host verifier.

fields.name: encrypted_value
docs: ZamaHost `EncryptedValue` lineage the handle belongs to.

fields.name: cleartext_amount
docs: KMS-certified cleartext amount (low 64 bits of the certified `uint256`).

types.name: HostConfig
docs: Singleton host configuration and authority surface.
`HostConfig` is the runtime switchboard for this PoC. Production-shaped
instructions reject while paused.

fields.name: admin
docs: Program administrator allowed to update config flags.

fields.name: chain_id
docs: Host-chain id included in handle derivation.

fields.name: gateway_chain_id
docs: EVM gateway chain id used in the coprocessor/KMS EIP-712 domain separators.

fields.name: input_verification_contract
docs: EVM `InputVerification` contract address: the EIP-712 verifying contract for
coprocessor `CiphertextVerification` input attestations.

fields.name: coprocessor_signers
docs: Registered coprocessor EVM signer set for input attestations (EVM `InputVerifier`
parity). Fixed-capacity so `HostConfig` keeps a pinned byte layout; only the first
`coprocessor_signer_count` entries are active, the rest are zero padding.

fields.name: coprocessor_signer_count
docs: Number of active entries in `coprocessor_signers`.

fields.name: coprocessor_threshold
docs: Minimum distinct valid signatures (n-of-m) required over an input attestation;
`1 <= coprocessor_threshold <= coprocessor_signer_count`.

fields.name: decryption_contract
docs: EVM `Decryption` contract address: the EIP-712 verifying contract for KMS
`PublicDecryptVerification` certificates (disclose/redeem).

fields.name: current_kms_context_id
docs: Active KMS context id (mirrors `ProtocolConfig.getCurrentKmsContextId`). The
signer set + thresholds live in the `KmsContext` PDA at this id; 0 means none
defined yet. Updated by `define_kms_context`.

fields.name: paused
docs: Pauses production-shaped host instructions when true.

fields.name: grant_deny_list_enabled
docs: Enables deny-list checks for persistent grant authorities.

fields.name: max_hcu_per_tx
docs: Max total HCU summed over one `fhe_eval` plan. `0` = unlimited (enforcement off).

fields.name: max_hcu_depth_per_tx
docs: Max critical-path (depth) HCU within one `fhe_eval` plan. `0` = unlimited.

fields.name: hcu_block_cap_per_app
docs: Per-app HCU budget per slot, enforced in `fhe_eval`. `u64::MAX` = unrestricted (the ship
default; short-circuits, touching no meter); `0` = ban untrusted apps (trusted still bypass);
any other value is the metering band (must be `>= max_hcu_per_tx` unless that is `0`).

fields.name: updated_slot
docs: Slot in which the config was initialized or last changed.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `PDA("host-config")`.

types.name: KmsContext
docs: A KMS context: the signer set + thresholds active under a `context_id`.

fields.name: context_id
docs: Monotonic context id (mirrors `kmsContextId`).

fields.name: signers
docs: KMS node signer EVM addresses authorized to sign certs in this context.

fields.name: thresholds
docs: Per-operation signature thresholds.

fields.name: destroyed
docs: True once destroyed (mirrors `destroyKmsContext`); destroyed contexts reject.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `PDA("kms-context", context_id)`.

types.name: KmsThresholds
docs: Per-operation signature thresholds for a KMS context (mirrors `KmsThresholds`).

fields.name: public_decryption
docs: Threshold for public-decrypt (disclose/redeem) certificates.

fields.name: user_decryption
docs: Threshold for user-decrypt certificates.

fields.name: kms_gen
docs: Threshold for key generation (KMS-internal; stored for fidelity).

fields.name: mpc
docs: Threshold for MPC (KMS-internal; stored for fidelity).

types.name: MmrInclusionProof
docs: Anchor-native mirror of `zama_solana_acl::MmrProof` for use as an instruction argument. The
shared ACL crate is deliberately Anchor-free (pure `borsh`) so it cannot derive Anchor IDL
metadata; this local type carries the identical wire shape and converts into the shared proof.
Defined in the host program so CPI callers depend only on the host IDL, never on token types.

fields.name: leaf_index
docs: Index of the proven leaf within the lineage's MMR.

fields.name: siblings
docs: Authentication path from the leaf up to its mountain peak.

types.name: RandomAmountCreatedEvent
docs: Emitted when the token program creates a token-scoped random amount.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: owner
docs: Token account owner.

fields.name: token_account
docs: Confidential token account.

fields.name: amount_kind
docs: Whether this amount is intended for transfer or burn.

fields.name: handle
docs: Newly created amount handle.

fields.name: encrypted_value
docs: ZamaHost ACL record initialized for the amount.

types.name: TotalSupplyHandleUpdatedEvent
docs: App-local total-supply history event.
This mirrors ERC7984's encrypted `_totalSupply` pointer at the Solana mint
level. The generic coprocessor listener consumes ZamaHost protocol events;
this event is for token-aware indexers.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: old_handle
docs: Previous total-supply handle.

fields.name: old_encrypted_value
docs: Previous ZamaHost ACL record.

fields.name: new_handle
docs: New total-supply handle.

fields.name: new_encrypted_value
docs: New ZamaHost ACL record.

fields.name: reason
docs: Reason this total-supply pointer changed.

types.name: TotalSupplyUpdateReason
docs: Reason code for [`TotalSupplyHandleUpdatedEvent`].
